item.title: They may have a point...
item.description: We check out the new setup for the truck, including Archon wheels and huge Venom Power Terra Hunter XT tires. The 14-wide look is insane in person, and this is just the start of the second-gen build with more big parts on the way.

media:content.media:title: They may have a point...
media:content.media:description: We check out the new setup for the truck, including Archon wheels and huge Venom Power Terra Hunter XT tires. The 14-wide look is insane in person, and this is just the start of the second-gen build with more big parts on the way.

item.title: Neighbors love me
item.description: Nieghbors actually don't like this at all
